summary: Completed testing of 407 Proxy Authentication Required error handling in CSDROP bot (Iteration 16). All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Key features verified: POST /api/csdrop/test-proxy endpoint, GET /api/csdrop/bot-signal endpoint, STRIKE_PAUSED signal file mechanism, Bot Status stat card states (OFF/PAUSED/LIVE), proxy error alert banner, Test Proxy button with loading state and 407 result display.
passed_tests: POST /api/csdrop/test-proxy returns expected fields (status, code, message/ip)
GET /api/csdrop/bot-signal returns signal:null when file absent
GET /api/csdrop/bot-signal reads other signal formats correctly
Frontend: Bot Status stat card shows OFF when bot not running and no signal
Frontend: Bot Status stat card shows PAUSED (yellow) when STRIKE_PAUSED signal exists
Frontend: Red proxy error alert banner appears when STRIKE_PAUSED signal exists
Frontend: Alert shows 407 message when reason contains '407'
Frontend: Sovereign Bot panel shows yellow PAUSED dot when signal active
Frontend: Test Proxy button shows loading state while testing
Frontend: Test Proxy shows red '407 Auth Required' result on 407 error
Frontend: Toast notification shows proxy error message
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing CSDROP user
context_for_next_testing_agent: 407 Proxy error handling feature fully tested. Key components: 1) POST /api/csdrop/test-proxy tests proxy via httpbin.org/ip and returns {status, code, message/ip}, 2) GET /api/csdrop/bot-signal reads /app/backend/clients/csdrop/bot_signal.txt and returns {signal, reason}, 3) sovereign.py writes 'STRIKE_PAUSED:proxy_auth_407' after 3 consecutive proxy failures, 4) Frontend fetches bot-signal in fetchData() via Promise.all, 5) Bot Status stat card shows PAUSED (yellow) when botSignal.signal === 'STRIKE_PAUSED', 6) Red proxy error alert banner (data-testid=cs-proxy-alert) appears when signal active, 7) Test Proxy button (data-testid=cs-test-proxy-btn) in Sovereign Bot tab shows loading spinner then result, 8) Sovereign Bot panel header shows yellow PAUSED dot when signal active. Note: The proxy in this environment actually returns 407, so test-proxy will always show error.

states.OFF: bot not running and no signal

frontend_test_proxy_button.location: Sovereign Bot tab, below Promo Link and Batch Size inputs
frontend_test_proxy_button.result_display: Shows CheckCircle2 + IP on success, XCircle + '407 Auth Required' on 407

frontend_bot_panel_paused_indicator.location: Sovereign Bot panel header, next to 'Sovereign Bot' text
frontend_bot_panel_paused_indicator.appearance: Yellow dot with 'PAUSED' text when signal active
